meaning: n.令,大量的纸vt.扩展,铰大,榨取,铰除,刮,欺骗
examples: They tell me that you'd like to make a statue (塑像) of me, is that correct, Miss Vinnie Ream?

Injured cell ream of repair and maintenance cell rebirth.
Anyway, this is from Paul Ream, who is probably watching this on TV somewhere in Madrid.
